payload.question: How many computer labs are in each building?

output.sql: SELECT b.building_name AS building, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN r.room_type = 'Computer Lab' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END), 0) AS computer_lab_count FROM buildings b LEFT JOIN rooms r ON b.building_id = r.building_id GROUP BY b.building_name ORDER BY computer_lab_count DESC;
